results.check_summary: Odd and even positional subsequences fit simple polynomial/periodic streams.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE: quadratic odd stream and constant even stream.

results.check_summary: Period-6 phase streams extrapolated from repeated phase values and arithmetic increments.
Recent phase-3 streams show arithmetic continuation; later terms extrapolated accordingly.
Periodic phase structure inferred from recurring values; extrapolation uncertain.
results.rule_summary: PDELTA with periodic phase-specific polynomial deltas.

results.check_summary: Interleaved streams exhibit modular/periodic behavior; continuation is low-confidence.
Large alternating phase behavior suggests periodic affine/linear recurrence dynamics.
results.rule_summary: AFFINE with repeating phase multipliers and biases.

results.check_summary: Mixed-growth prefix suggests interleaved or phase-specific recurrence; extrapolation uncertain.
Odd terms decrease by 1 and even terms decrease by 4.
Periodic/interleaved structure inferred from recurring phase values; low-confidence continuation.
Three phase streams show repeated second-difference behavior in the tail.
results.rule_summary: PDELTA with period-3 polynomial phase updates.

results.check_summary: Phase-wise growth inferred from the later prefix, but multiple families remain plausible.
Growing descending arithmetic blocks are visible; next block start is extrapolated.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK with polynomial block starts and steps.
